Localization.Description: Attempt to change access rights to a secret

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to change access rights to a secret on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is changing access rights to a secret on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed access rights to a secret on host {event_src.host}
